message:
refactor(doctor_frankentui/seed): drop unused Deadline helpers and pass deadline by reference

`Deadline::with_cancellation` and `Deadline::is_done` had no remaining
callers — `with_cancellation` was a builder hook from before the
cancellation token started being installed at construction time, and
`is_done` was always called via the explicit `is_expired() ||
is_cancelled()` form at the call sites. Drop both to silence the
dead-code warnings without changing semantics.

Also flip `wait_for_server` and the seed helpers to take `&Deadline`
instead of consuming it: the deadline is reused across the seed
phases that follow `wait_for_server`, and the previous by-value
signature forced an awkward clone. The helper does not need
ownership.
